_TEMPLATE: THIS IS A TEMPLATE, NOT A REAL VALIDATION CASE. It is not loaded by the ledger (it lives in templates/ and is not listed in manifest.json). To add a real case: copy the 'example_case' object below, replace every value with REAL, externally-reviewed data (do NOT invent outcomes), save it as its own JSON file, and run: python scripts/phase_15g_add_validation_case.py path/to/your_case.json . New scored cases should default to used_for_holdout=true (blind).

_field_notes.metadata.validation_status: scored = predicted+observed present; pending = prediction locked, outcome not yet observed; partial = incomplete; excluded = do not use
_field_notes.prediction_lock.locked_prediction_create: ISO date the prediction was LOCKED. Must be on/before the observed outcome date (leakage check).
_field_notes.prediction_lock.leakage_risk: low|medium|high|unknown — set EXPLICITLY for scored/holdout cases. 'high' stores the case but excludes it from clean holdout.
_field_notes.observed.denominator_type: comments|independent_voices|backers|upvotes|mixed_proxy|unknown — be honest about what the proportions were measured against. Tier-1 action grades (e.g. backers) earn higher confidence.
_field_notes.observed.observed_at: ISO date the outcome was observed (optional but recommended; powers the leakage check).
_field_notes.action_signals[].signal_type: Tier-1 (purchase/paid_signup/kickstarter_pledge/trial_conversion/install/github_fork/retention/churn), Tier-2 (github_star/product_hunt_upvote/waitlist_signup/...), etc. tier auto-fills from the taxonomy.
_field_notes.anti_overfit.used_for_holdout: true for new BLIND cases. used_for_training and used_for_holdout can never both be true.

prediction_lock.clean_room_notes: Prediction locked before the outcome was observed.

observed.observation_notes: Replace with the real observed-outcome source + count.
